title: Ubiquiti UP-FloodLight - UniFi Protect Flood Light
description: The UniFi Protect FloodLight is a powerful smart LED halogen with a long-range motion sensor. Halogen is powered over Ethernet via 802.3af PoE and its functions are managed through the UniFi Protect application , which is available for Android and iOS platforms integrated motion and light sensor motion detection at a distance of up to 5m light with an intensity of 550 Lumens power supply via PoE IPx5 certification easy setup via mobile app Halogen Wall mount Angle wall mount Diffuser Set of screws GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
